items.name: lib
items.title: Lumo commerce model and money utilities
items.description: The canonical commerce data model (Product, Variant, Money, CartLine, Address) and minor-unit-aware money helpers that every Lumo block builds on. Map your backend onto these types once.

items.name: price-display
items.title: Price Display
items.description: Renders a Money value with optional compare-at price and discount badge.

items.name: rating-stars
items.title: Rating Stars
items.description: Accessible star rating with an optional review count.

items.name: quantity-stepper
items.title: Quantity Stepper
items.description: Accessible increment and decrement control with min and max clamping.

items.name: variant-selector
items.title: Variant Selector
items.description: Option picker that detects which variant combinations are available.

items.name: product-card
items.title: Product Card
items.description: Responsive product card with badges, rating, price, and quick actions.

items.name: product-grid
items.title: Product Grid
items.description: Responsive product grid with loading skeletons and an empty state.

items.name: search-bar
items.title: Search Bar
items.description: A controlled, accessible search input with a clear button and an optional loading spinner. Submit on Enter for query-on-submit search.

items.name: sort-select
items.title: Sort Select
items.description: A sort-order dropdown with a sensible default set of e-commerce options (featured, price, rating, newest). Bring your own items to customize.

items.name: filter-panel
items.title: Filter Panel
items.description: A faceted filter panel: groups of checkboxes with optional result counts, an active-filter count, and a clear-all control. Fully controlled.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Accessible page navigation with previous/next controls and a truncated page range with ellipses.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: An accessible breadcrumb trail. The last crumb is marked as the current page; pass href on the rest to make them links.

items.name: cart-line-item
items.title: Cart Line Item
items.description: A single cart line with image, variant, quantity stepper, and line total.

items.name: cart-summary
items.title: Cart Summary
items.description: Subtotal, optional total, taxes-and-shipping note, and a checkout button.

items.name: cart-drawer
items.title: Cart Drawer
items.description: Accessible slide-over cart built on Radix Dialog, with line items and summary.

items.name: cart-provider
items.title: Cart Provider
items.description: Optional, backend-agnostic cart state. A CartProvider context and useCart hook that add lines, merge duplicate variants, update quantities, and compute the subtotal. Sync to your backend through onLinesChange.

items.name: address-form
items.title: Address Form
items.description: A validated shipping/billing address form (react-hook-form + zod) that emits a normalized Address.

items.name: order-summary
items.title: Order Summary
items.description: A read-only order review with line items, subtotal, shipping, tax, and total.

items.name: checkout-form
items.title: Checkout Form
items.description: A payment-agnostic checkout: contact and shipping fields with validation, a payment slot, an order summary, and submit states. Wire your own PSP.

items.name: order-confirmation
items.title: Order Confirmation
items.description: A post-purchase confirmation with order number, receipt email, item summary, and total.
